mapper.insert: INSERT INTO approval_signs (approval_id, approver_id, target_id, stage, status, comment, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{approvalId}, #{approverId}, #{targetId}, #{stage, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{comment}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, approval_id, approver_id, target_id, stage, status, comment, created_at, updated_at FROM approval_signs WHERE approval_id = #{approvalId} ORDER BY created_at
SELECT id, approval_id, approver_id, target_id, stage, status, comment, created_at, updated_at FROM approval_signs WHERE approver_id = #{approverId} AND status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY created_at DESC
